Notes: Attempt to add a non-CNAME RR at a name that already has a CNAME. Servers may differ on whether they reject the UPDATE or accept it while preserving or discarding the CNAME.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR at alias.campus.edu., which already owns a CNAME to target.campus.edu.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the existing CNAME remains present after the UPDATE attempt.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the added A RR became visible at the CNAME owner.
